TabDescription: Official RedDune Solutions website. Professional technological solutions to help with your projects.

Hero.title: <row>The right</row><row><accent>answer</accent>.</row><row>For any problem.</row>
Hero.description: Custom IT solutions for individuals and businesses — technical support, web and data recovery. With the trust, efficiency and transparency you expect.

Process.title: Three steps. No detours.
Process.subtitle: Clear process from first contact to delivery.

step1.title: Conversation
step1.description: We listen to the problem or idea. No jargon, no pressure. We assess what makes sense for you.

step2.title: Proposal
step2.description: You receive a transparent quote, realistic deadlines and the path explained step by step.

step3.title: Delivery
step3.description: We execute with rigour, test everything and deliver with warranty. We stay available afterwards.

Testimonials.title: What people say
Testimonials.subtitle: Some of the people and businesses who trusted us.

ServicesSection.title: A <accent>complete</accent> range, tailored to what you need.
ServicesSection.description: From a laptop that won't turn on to your company's website that needs an upgrade. We work with individuals and businesses, always with the same transparency.

tecAssist.title: Technical <accent>Support</accent>
tecAssist.description: Diagnosis and repair of computers, consoles and electronic equipment. Speed, precision and total transparency — we explain what we'll do before we do it.

webDigital.title: Web & <accent>Digital</accent>
webDigital.description: Modern websites, e-commerce and custom systems. Designed to work on any screen, quick to load and easy for your client to use.

dataRecovery.title: Software & <accent>Recovery</accent>
dataRecovery.description: Installation and configuration of operating systems, drivers and essential software. Recovery of lost data — photos, documents, projects.

ServicesSection.quote: Didn't find what you were looking for? Our passion is creating <accent>tailored solutions</accent>. <contactLink>Tell us your idea</contactLink> and we'll turn it into reality.

PortfolioSection.title: A glimpse into our world of <accent>solutions</accent>.
PortfolioSection.description: Selected cases from our three areas — from computers built piece by piece to websites delivered in under a week.

AboutUsSection.title: Technology and <accent>digital innovation</accent> — with feet planted in the sand.
AboutUsSection.description: RedDune Solutions is a technology and digital innovation company, focused on providing complete solutions for computer maintenance, electronic equipment repair, and modern, efficient websites.
AboutUsSection.description2: We combine technical knowledge, trust and commitment to ensure quality results tailored to each client's needs. Our goal is to simplify technology and help people and businesses make the most of the digital world.

ContactCTA.title:
Solutions

for your problems.
ContactCTA.description: Talk to us and we'll find the right solution. We're always available to help — in person in Fuseta or remotely anywhere in the country.

ContactSection.title: Get in Touch
ContactSection.description: Have a project in mind or need assistance? We're here to help! Get in touch with us and we'll discuss how we can work together to bring your ideas to life.

useToast.successDescription: Thank you for contacting us! We will respond as soon as possible.
useToast.errorDescription: An error occurred while sending your message. Please try again later.

hero.title: Everything you <accent>need</accent>, in one place.
hero.lead: Technical support, web development and data recovery. We serve individuals and businesses, in person or remotely.

intro.title: Three pillars, tied to the same <accent>philosophy</accent>.
intro.lead: Trust, efficiency and transparency. Every job goes through the same three filters — whether it's a bent laptop or an e-commerce from scratch.

assistencia-tecnica.title: Technical <accent>Support</accent>
assistencia-tecnica.description: Repair and maintenance of computers, consoles and electronic equipment. Cleaning, upgrades, screen swaps, formatting.

web-digital.title: Web & <accent>Digital</accent>
web-digital.description: Websites, e-commerce, visual identity. We build your digital presence from scratch with modern tech and conversion-first thinking.

software-recuperacao.title: Software & <accent>Recovery</accent>
software-recuperacao.description: OS installs, drivers, antivirus. Recovery of photos, documents and projects lost to drive failure or accidental deletion.

steps.label: Diagnosis
steps.sub: You describe the problem; we assess and quote — always before touching anything.

steps.label: Execution
steps.sub: You approve, we do it. We keep you posted every step, in plain language.

steps.label: Delivery
steps.sub: Device tested, data intact, clear invoice. Warranty included in the price.

PricingPage.title: Plans and Pricing
PricingPage.subtitle: Transparent and flexible solutions for every need.

maintenance.title: Hardware Maintenance and Repair Services
maintenance.desc: Complete solutions for maintenance, diagnosis and repair of your equipment.

price_table.service1_info: Cleaning of fans and heatsinks without dismantling components, cabinet windows only
price_table.service2_info: Cleaning of all components, opening of graphics card, power supply etc. Includes total disassembly and high quality thermal paste
price_table.service3_info: Installation of components (RAM, SSD, Graphics Card, etc) with configuration and testing
price_table.service4_info: Problem identification on the equipment. Cost is deducted from repair budget
price_table.service5_info: OS installation, updated drivers and basic software, without data backup
price_table.service6_info: Formatting with data transfer and security
price_table.service7_info: Virus cleaning, antivirus configuration and prevention programs
price_table.service8_info: Recovery of lost data from formatting, corrupted or inaccessible disk

assembly.title: PC Assembly Services
assembly.desc: Professional computer assembly with complete testing and optimization.

price_table.service1_info: Physical assembly, cable management, BIOS update, OS installation, drivers and stress test
price_table.service2_info: Includes XMP/EXPO profile configuration, fan curve and RGB settings
price_table.service3_info: 360mm watercoolers, complex cases and extended stability testing

web_services.title: Web Development Services
web_services.desc: Professional digital solutions for your online presence.

price_table.service1_info: Single page for campaign, lead capture or product launch
price_table.service2_info: Home, About, Services, Contact, etc. Increases with more pages, blog, multilingual and SEO
price_table.service3_info: Catalog, shopping cart, payments, shipping, billing. Can increase with many products and integrations
price_table.service4_info: Portal, member area, built-from-scratch features with scope, integrations and specific functionality

customProjectCard.title: Didn't find what you're looking for?
customProjectCard.desc: In case of a specific problem or project, we have custom solutions for complex needs.
customProjectCard.text: If your project doesn't fit the above packages, contact us. We'll be happy to analyze your needs and provide a customized solution.

hero.title: Our Shop
hero.description: Discover our computers, components and accessories. Contact us to purchase any product.

ShopPage.noResults: No products found matching your search.
ShopPage.emptyState: No products available at the moment.

Footer.tagline: Computer repair, web development and data recovery in Fuseta, Algarve. Personalised service for individuals and businesses.

WarrantyPolicyPage.metaTitle: Warranty Policy — RedDune Solutions | New and Refurbished Equipment
WarrantyPolicyPage.metaDescription: Learn about RedDune Solutions' warranty policy: 3 years for new equipment and 6 months for refurbished. Shop with complete peace of mind.
WarrantyPolicyPage.title: Warranty Policy
WarrantyPolicyPage.subtitle: Your satisfaction and peace of mind are our priority.
WarrantyPolicyPage.intro: All of our products come with a warranty. Shop with confidence, knowing you're covered.
WarrantyPolicyPage.closingBody: With this policy, we aim to ensure your complete peace of mind when choosing your equipment. For more information, reach out to us anytime.

PrivacyPolicyPage.metaDescription: Learn how Reddune Solutions collects, processes and protects your personal data in compliance with the GDPR.
PrivacyPolicyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicyPage.subtitle: Your privacy is our priority. Learn how we handle your personal data.
PrivacyPolicyPage.section2P1: The Personal Data Protection Law and the General Data Protection Regulation (Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 27 April 2016, hereinafter "GDPR") guarantee protection regarding the processing of personal data and the free movement of such data.
PrivacyPolicyPage.section2P2: Under the law, "personal data" is considered to be any and all information (including sound and image) relating to an identified or identifiable natural person; protection does not extend to data of legal persons.
PrivacyPolicyPage.section2P3: By providing your personal data through the website https://www.reddunesolutions.pt/, namely by filling in forms or by contacting us, the user declares that this information is provided freely, in an informed and explicit manner, authorising its collection and processing under the terms described herein.
PrivacyPolicyPage.section2P4: Reddune Solutions undertakes to process users' personal data with full transparency and responsibility, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation and other applicable legislation.
PrivacyPolicyPage.section2P5: Users may, at any time, withdraw their consent without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out on the basis of consent previously given. To do so, they should contact us through the means available on this website.
PrivacyPolicyPage.section2P6: If you do not agree with the terms of this Privacy Policy, we recommend that you do not use this site or provide any personal data.
PrivacyPolicyPage.section3Intro: Personal data collected by Reddune Solutions is processed solely and exclusively for the following purposes:
PrivacyPolicyPage.section3Item1: Execution and management of sales contracts or service provision;
PrivacyPolicyPage.section3Item3: Management of contacts and information requests;
PrivacyPolicyPage.section3Item8: Improvement of the website and user experience through the analysis of navigation data, statistics and site usage.
PrivacyPolicyPage.section3Outro: Reddune Solutions guarantees the confidentiality of all data provided by its clients and undertakes not to use such data for purposes other than those described above, except where there is new consent from the user or a legal obligation permitting it.
PrivacyPolicyPage.section4P1: Reddune Solutions retains your personal data only for the period strictly necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected. Once this retention period has elapsed, Reddune Solutions ensures that your personal data is deleted.
PrivacyPolicyPage.closingBody: We are available to clarify any doubts about the processing of your personal data or to help you exercise your rights under the GDPR.
